openPRs.description: AC8+AC9 full story blocks in phase3 backlog + Step 0 squad registration in validation playbook

checkpoint.contextAtWrite: Phase 3 discovery written (commit 5e312e4). Full reading of ref-skills-platform-phase3.md + workspace backlog files + operating-model + standards-model + phase3-4. 13 priority groups. FINAL-TEST.md and TEST-TRACE.md deleted. Local master synced to origin/master (02d637d).
checkpoint.resumeInstruction: Phase 3 discovery in progress. Artefact at artefacts/2026-04-14-skills-platform-phase3/discovery.md — Draft, awaiting approval. Next: human review and approval of discovery artefact, then /benefit-metric. Priority order within Phase 3: (1) test/governance hardening, (2) T3M1 Q2-Q8 fill, (3) gate structural independence, (4) eval anti-gaming, (5) Windows validator, (6) D10/D10a, (7) cross-team trace registry, (8) enterprise channel adapters, (9) AGENTS.md validation, (10-13) EA registry, estimation calibration, contribution flow, compliance report.
